$comment: Claim set for Proof of Employment / Alumni ID. Deliberately omits salary/compensation — proves the employment relationship only. JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.
title: Proof of Employment claim set

employer.description: Legal name of the employing organization.

status.description: Whether the holder is a current or former employee (alumni).

employment_end.description: Employment end date. Present only when status is 'former'.

allOf.$comment: A former employee must have an end date.
